tasks.label: sync-mobile-source
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root = 'C:\Users\user\Downloads\Gym-Log-Master'; $mobile = Join-Path $root 'artifacts\mobile'; $dirs = @('app','assets','components','constants','context','data','hooks','server','types'); $files = @('app.json','babel.config.js','eas.json','expo-env.d.ts','metro.config.js','package.json','tsconfig.json','tsconfig.base.json'); foreach ($dir in $dirs) { $src = Join-Path $root $dir; $dst = Join-Path $mobile $dir; if (Test-Path $src) { if (-not (Test-Path $dst)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dst -Force | Out-Null }; robocopy $src $dst /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /nc /ns /np | Out-Null } }; foreach ($file in $files) { $src = Join-Path $root $file; $dst = Join-Path $mobile $file; if (Test-Path $src) { Copy-Item $src $dst -Force } }; foreach ($dir in $dirs) { $path = Join-Path $root $dir; if (Test-Path $path) { Remove-Item $path -Recurse -Force } }; foreach ($file in $files) { $path = Join-Path $root $file; if (Test-Path $path) { Remove-Item $path -Force } }; Write-Host 'sync-complete'"
